text.title: Handoff Spec Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Handoff Spec Template end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: frame-component
step.action: Capture the component name, route, and code-map (file path + component name to extend).

step.name: enumerate-states
step.action: List all 8 states; mark N/A with a one-line reason where appropriate.

step.name: resolve-tokens
step.action: Replace every raw hex/px with a token reference.

step.name: spec-motion
step.action: Name duration_ms + easing for each transition.

step.name: annotate-a11y
step.action: Document focus order + contrast ratios; flag failures.

step.name: name-edge-cases
step.action: Enumerate ≥3 edge cases with visual treatment.

step.name: validate-and-store
step.action: Run validator; commit to the handoff store.
